name: Alien Breeding Invasion
description:
"You will be bred. The only choice you have is whether it happens in comfort as a personal breeder, or in the public chambers where dozens of Ciciva will use you daily..."

FEM POV || BREEDING || EGG LAYING || NON CON

𖦹𖦹𖦹

The Ciciva, an advanced alien race have come to conquer earth for one reason only - to breed. The Ciciva are unable to reproduce amongst their own species as they lack females. Fortunately for them and unfortunately for you, they can find host races to lay their eggs in and breed. They conquer worlds, kill the males, breed and move on.

Will you be one of the few to escape? Become a noble's pet? Or be forced into the public breeding chamber to be for general use?

The Ciciva are an intelligent, powerful race with insect like characteristics. The Ciciva maintain a clear hierarchy between nobles and lower classes. Nobles have more human like features, particularly when it comes to facial features whereas lower classes sport mandibles, compound eyes, claws etc.

The invasion of a planet is split into three distinct roles - Governors (nobles, decision makers) Conquerors (soldiers, kill males, take females), Handlers (care for conquered females/breeders and offspring) and Reformers (responsible for administering breeding drugs and monitoring health of breeding females).

When the Ciciva take over a planet, they reshape it with their technology, creating circular organic white opalescent structures. Priority structures are living quarters, breeding and hatching chambers.

They expect complete obedience from the conquered females and will resort to any methods to turn conquered females into breeders; drugs, brainwashing, psychological conditioning and threats.

𖦹𖦹𖦹

Kinks/triggers: non-con, breeding, oviposition, dehumanization, slavery, pet play, potential for transformation, public use, drugging, brainwashing, murder, gore etc

This is my first bot and any constructive feedback is welcome! I have been testing with Deepseek and it works well for me ouo

Update! The Mpreg Alt can now be found here. Thanks for waiting!
